mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL(ROUND(SUM(IFNULL(v.activePower, IFNULL(m.activePower, i.activePower))), 2), 0) AS generationNow FROM site s JOIN time_zone tz ON tz.id = s.id_time_zone JOIN ( )m ON m.id_site = s.id JOIN () i ON i.id_site = s.id JOIN () v ON v.id_site = s.id WHERE s.status = 1 AND s.is_delete = 0 AND (CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), 'UTC', tz.value) < s.expiration OR s.expiration IS NULL)
